label: P&L Estimate
description: Buy notional, sell notional, gas estimate, and net P&L estimate via KpiStrip with factor breakdown.

0.1.note: WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets.

0.5.note: No mock imports in widget file.

0.6.note: — context is pure local state (no async fetch); no isLoading field.

0.7.note: Empty state present (steps.length===0 guard with informative message).

0.8.note: — context has no error field; WidgetErrorBoundary handles render errors.

l0.notes: 0.1 WidgetErrorBoundary in widget-wrapper.tsx covers all grid widgets. 0.2 requiredEntitlements=[execution-basic,execution-full]. 0.3 availableOn=[bundles]. 0.4 No any types or @ts-ignore. 0.5 No mock imports in widget file. 0.6 N/A — context is pure local state (no async fetch); no isLoading field. 0.7 Empty state present (steps.length===0 guard with informative message). 0.8 N/A — context has no error field; WidgetErrorBoundary handles render errors. 0.9 No dead code.

1.1.note: Data sourced from useBundlesData() hook (steps, totalCost, totalRevenue, estimatedGas, netPnl).

1.2.note: Context calls useGlobalScope() and derives hasDefiDesk from org scope.

1.3.note: Org filter adjusts scoped templates; P&L values derive from steps (no direct org filtering needed for P&L display). 1.4-1.5 N/A — P&L is a derived display widget; client/strategy cascade not applicable.

1.4.note: 1.5 N/A — P&L is a derived display widget; client/strategy cascade not applicable.

1.5.note: — P&L is a derived display widget; client/strategy cascade not applicable.

1.6.note: Empty org scope → hasDefiDesk=true → no restriction.

1.7.note: Reference data in lib/config/services/bundle.config — correct location.
